extraction.one_line_summary: POLANC Jan soloed to victory on Mt. Etna, staying clear of a 20-rider GC group in brutal headwinds after attacking in the early breakaway.
tactical_patterns: Polanc sustained higher power than GC group's 368-385 watts to solo upwind Mt. Etna, defying typical late-stage script.
Movistar refused to wait after moto crash 15km from Blockhaus finish, exploiting ambiguity in peloton patron system.
Sky notably avoided criticizing Movistar's no-wait decision, revealing pragmatic acceptance of racing through crashes late in stages.

rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: positive: Extended GC lead to 28sec over Dumoulin/Pinot by racing through moto crash with 15km remaining
rider_signals.KELDERMAN Wilco: negative: Race-ending finger break from moto crash eliminated Sunweb's dual-leader strategy before mountain stages
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: negative: 4-5 minutes down after Blockhaus moto crash, but commentary suggests podium still tactically viable
rider_signals.YATES Adam: negative: 4-5 minutes down but commentators expect continued GC pursuit rather than stage-hunting pivot
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: negative: GC hopes eliminated by moto crash despite being in contention before Blockhaus incident
rider_signals.POLANC Jan: positive: Second Giro stage win, sustained breakthrough power into headwind against 20-rider chase, underrated climbing ability confirmed
